value Item
  name: String
  price: Int
end

let items = [
  Item(name: "apple", price: 120),
  Item(name: "bread", price: 300),
  Item(name: "cheese", price: 480),
]

mut subtotal = 0
mut i = 0
while i < items.len()
  let item = match items.get(i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    panic("unreachable")
  end
  subtotal = subtotal + item.price
  i = i + 1
end

let total = if subtotal >= 500
  subtotal - 100
else
  subtotal
end

print("subtotal=#{subtotal}")
print("total=#{total}")
